name: Rush Street Interactive, Inc.
summary: PART I Unless the context requires otherwise, each of the terms the Company, Rush Street Interactive, RSI, we, our, us and similar terms used herein refer collectively to Rush Street Interactive, Inc., a Delaware corporation, and its consolidated subsidiaries. Overview We are a leading online gaming and entertainment company that focuses primarily on online casino and online sports betting in the U.S., Canadian and Latin American markets.
